_doc: USD per million tokens, from each provider's public list pricing as of mid-2026. Gateways and proxies may charge differently — these are estimates for cases where the agent CLI doesn't report cost directly. To override at runtime, set CAE_PRICING_JSON to a JSON file whose entries take precedence over these defaults. Field defaults if missing: input/output required; cache_read and cache_creation default to 0 (i.e., billed as zero, distinct from 'same as input').
_doc_anthropic: Anthropic — cache_read is 10% of input, cache_creation is 1.25× input (the standard prompt-cache discount and write surcharge).
_doc_openai: OpenAI — cache_read is 50% of input (their automatic prompt caching; different discount than Anthropic's). No separate cache_creation tier.
_doc_minimax: MiniMax — no documented prompt-cache discount tier, so cache_read is set equal to input (conservative: cached tokens billed at the full input rate). OpenRouter often runs 50% launch promotions; override via CAE_PRICING_JSON if your gateway charges those rates.
